title: References
description: Contract lookup surfaces for you-agent-factory: HTTP API, events, schemas, command-line interface (CLI), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and JavaScript runtime.
openingSummary: This family collects the published contract surfaces for you-agent-factory. Use it when you need to look up API operations, event shapes, configuration schemas, command-line interface (CLI) commands, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, or JavaScript runtime bindings—without treating this landing as a how-to guide.

introduction.title: What this family covers
introduction.body: References are isolation-first lookup pages for factory contracts. Each linked surface owns one contract family: the HTTP API, durable event corpora, factory and config schemas, the command-line interface (CLI) command matrix, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool contracts, or the JavaScript runtime surface. Start here to choose the right contract page; open a child page only when you need that surface’s fields, operations, or examples.

discoverability.title: Contract surfaces
discoverability.body: Each card opens one contract family. Labels stay readable on narrow viewports.

freshness.title: Package freshness
freshness.body: This family documents the installed public API package identity below. Version and source commit come from the published package manifest—not hand-copied strings.

api.title: HTTP API
api.body: OpenAPI operations and request/response contracts for the factory HTTP surface.

events.title: Events
events.body: Durable event corpora and envelope shapes for factory response streams.

factory-schema.title: Factory schema
factory-schema.body: JSON Schema for packaged factory documents and their required fields.

system-config-schema.title: System configuration schema
system-config-schema.body: Configuration schema for you-agent-factory runtime and workspace settings.

mock-workers-schema.title: Mock workers schema
mock-workers-schema.body: Schema for mock worker definitions used in local and test harnesses.

cli.title: Command-line interface (CLI)
cli.body: Command matrix and flags for the you command-line interface (CLI).

mcp.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
mcp.body: Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool contracts exposed by the factory.

javascript-runtime.title: JavaScript runtime
javascript-runtime.body: JavaScript runtime bindings and package surface for embedding factory work.

freshnessUnavailable.title: Package freshness unavailable
freshnessUnavailable.body: The published API package manifest could not be read for this build. Contract surface cards below remain available; package identity and version appear here when the manifest resolves.
